config.description: Baseline benchmark for core-loop v1 with default configuration

tests.name: Button
tests.instruction: A primary action button with hover, focus, and disabled states. Uses accent token for background, white text. Sharp corners, no shadow. Reference the active design system's Button primitive if available.

tests.name: MetricCard
tests.instruction: A metric stat card with a large figure (42px mono weight 900), label (10px tag uppercase tracked), and optional hero/highlight variant with lime background. Hairline border all sides, no shadow, sharp corners.

tests.name: NavigationBar
tests.instruction: A top navigation bar with brand wordmark on the left, primary CTA button isolated on the right. 48px height, hairline bottom border, px-4 padding. Ink accent CTA with white text. One accent budget for the whole page.

tests.name: DataTable
tests.instruction: A data table with sortable columns (click header to sort), zebra striping on alternating rows (surface-raised background for even rows), header row with accent bottom border (2px), pagination controls at the bottom, and an empty state with a centered message. Each column has a header cell with sort indicator.

tests.name: FeatureShowcase
tests.instruction: A 3-column feature grid with numbered step cards. Each card has a Badge primitive (01 . TODAY), display subtitle (26px weight 700 uppercase), body description (16px), and optional footer tag (10px tag). One hero card with lime highlight background and ink type. Uses Card primitive from @ds. Stack gap 3 between cards.

tests.name: PricingTable
tests.instruction: A 3-tier pricing table with monthly/annual toggle at the top, feature comparison rows below, and a highlighted 'Popular' middle tier with accent border (2px). Each tier has a title, price, feature list, and CTA button. The popular tier uses surface-raised background and the accent border to stand out.

tests.name: DashboardView
tests.instruction: A full dashboard view composing MetricCards, a DataTable, and a chart area placeholder. 12-column grid layout, 1400px container max, 64px section rhythm. KPI rail on the left (160px fixed width) with delta figures, content area on the right. Features a page-level lime highlight field with the primary KPI figure. One accent budget for the whole page.
